title: Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series
content:
## Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series

### What Lies Ahead for Canada After the Adoption of a Global Baseline for Sustainability and Climate Related Disclosure?
McCarthy Tétrault is pleased to invite you to the first seminar of our exclusive Navigating the ESG & Sustainability Landscape Series. In this session, experts will discuss the ISSB sustainability and climate-related disclosure standards (IFRS S1 and S2) issued in June 2023 and their impact in Canada.
- Granville Martin , Director, Regulatory Outreach, International Financial Reporting Standards Foundation (IFRS)
- Martin Latulippe , Lawyer and Senior Policy Advisor, Autorité des marchés financiers (AMF)
- Sonia Struthers , Partner and Co-Leader, ESG & Sustainability, McCarthy Tétrault
- Myreille Gilbert , Partner, Business Law, McCarthy Tétrault
Note : The presentation will take place in-person in our Montréal office and via webinar nationally, in English only. Please select your preferred location when registering. All instructions and information on how to access the webinar will be shared a few days before the event.
For information about this seminar, please email montrealevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program qualifies for up to 1.5 hours of CPD credit under the mandatory education regimes in British Columbia and Ontario.
Barreau du Québec Continuing Education : This program contains up to 1.5 hours of content. For more information regarding the declaration and recognition of educational activities, please contact the Barreau du Québec .
11:30 a.m. — Registration and lunch 12:00 p.m. — Seminar Begins 1:30 p.m. — Seminar Concludes
